title: Road Quality / Pothole Tracker MVP — Design Document
summary: Technical design for an LA-area road-quality-aware route optimization web app with map visualization, covering architecture, DB schema, scoring math, API contracts, and pipeline.
notes: Date-prefixed filename matched ADR regex but content is a mixed design document. Dominant signals are SPEC-shaped: DB schema tables, API endpoint definitions with request/response JSON, scoring formulas, and protocol definitions. Contains a 'Decisions' table and 'Status: Approved' which are ADR-like, but the doc covers many decisions rather than one, uses no ADR numbering, and lacks Context/Consequences structure. No user stories or acceptance criteria rule out PRD. Classified SPEC; synthesizer may wish to extract the Decisions table separately as locked architectural choices.
